title: Intelligent Automation Developer II - UiPath/Agentic AI
company_focus: Healthcare insurance and managed care services
description:
Job Summary:

The Intelligent Automation Developer II creates and
implements Intelligent Process Automation using UiPath
and/or Power Automate, Python- AI/ ML solutions based on
business requirements and in accordance with standard
automation tool design principles and conventions.

Essential Functions:

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify areas
  where intelligent/ robotic Process automation and AI/ ML
  can be applied to streamline processes, reduce manual
  efforts, and deliver tangible business benefits
- Work closely with business stakeholders to gather and define
  requirements for AI/ML and intelligent/ robotic project
  automation projects; translate business needs into
  technical specifications
- Analyze and preprocess data to ensure its quality,
  relevance, and suitability for AI/ML model development;
  collaborate with data engineers to establish data
  pipelines and data governance
- Identify and implement opportunities for process automation
  using technologies like robotic process automation (RPA)
  and intelligent process automation (IPA); create and
  maintain automation workflows
- Apply understanding of the design, development, and
  deployment for machine learning models and algorithms to
  solve business challenges which may involve selecting
  appropriate algorithms, feature engineering, model
  training, and optimization.
- Monitor the performance of deployed AI/ML models and
  automation solutions; continuously assess their accuracy,
  efficiency, and effectiveness, and iterate on improvements
  as necessary
- Collaborate with IT, data science, and business teams to
  ensure seamless integration of AI/ML and automation
  solutions into existing systems and workflows
- Provide training and support to end-users who interact with
  AI/ML models or automated systems; address queries and
  troubleshoot issues as needed
- Provide guidance to stakeholders in conceptualizing and
  developing new software programs and applications
- Assist in the preparation and documentation of software
  requirements and specifications
- Research and document requirements of software users
- Support team goals on a technical level making sure that the
  solutions proposed and designed are in line with the
  department and CareSource vision
- Assist the Architectural Council with technical knowledge
  regarding emerging technologies to help drive strategy
- Consistently write, translate, and code software programs
  and applications according to specifications
- Lead projects from a development standpoint and coordinate
  activities with the developer teams as needed
- Perform technical code reviews of peers to ensure proper
  coding methodology is being adhered to
- Perform any other job duties as requested

Education and Experience:

- Bachelor of Science degree in the field of computer science
  or software engineering or equivalent years of relevant
  work experience required
- Minimum of five (5) years of UiPath Robotic Process
  Automation experience is required
- Minimum of two (2) years of AI/ ML using Python is required
- Experience in end-to-end development of business processes
  using UiPath Robotic Process Automation is required
- UiPath and/or Power Automate experience is required
- Agentic AI/ Generative AI experience is required
- Experience developing and designing n-tier applications with
  multi-tier architectures is preferred
- UML Modeling experience is preferred

Competencies, Knowledge and Skills:

- Design, build and deploy RPA/ IPA solutions using UiPath
- Working technical knowledge of object-based programming
  languages, including C#, VB.NET, ASP.NET, or Python
- SML, XSLT, Schema coding experience and translation
  abilities
- Web service development knowledge
- Strong relational database experience including tuning,
  stored procedure development and use of reporting services
  in a Microsoft environment
- Healthcare and Facets experience and developing applications
  in the healthcare sector preferred
- Hands on experience working in integrated development
  environments, including SVN, Microsoft Visual Studio, Team
  Foundation Server
- Familiarity with PDD/TDD and Iterative software development
  methodologies
- Flexible and adaptable in regard to learning and
  understanding new technologies
- Strong written and oral communication skills
- Strong interpersonal skills
- Ability to conduct research into software-related issues and
  products
- Technically proficient
- Highly self-motivated and directed
- Proven analytical and problem-solving abilities
- Ability to effectively prioritize and execute tasks in a
  high-pressure environment
- Ability to work both independently and in a team-oriented,
  collaborative environment
- Ability to work additional hours to meet project deadlines

Licensure and Certification:

- UiPath Certification and/or Power Automate certification is
  strongly preferred
- Certification on Data Science and AI/ML is strongly
  preferred
- Certifications in technical tools and/or other programming
  languages preferred (MCSD, Java, Onbase, Tibco, SAP, etc.)

Working Conditions:

- General office environment; may be required to sit or stand
  for extended periods of time

Compensation Range:

$72,200.00 - $115,500.00

CareSource takes into consideration a combination of a
candidate’s education, training, and experience as well as
the position’s scope and complexity, the discretion and
latitude required for the role, and other external and
internal data when establishing a salary level. In addition
to base compensation, you may qualify for a bonus tied to
company and individual performance. We are highly invested
in every employee’s total well-being and offer a substantial
and comprehensive total rewards package.

Compensation Type (hourly/salary):

Salary

Organization Level Competencies

- Fostering a Collaborative Workplace Culture
- Cultivate Partnerships
- Develop Self and Others
- Drive Execution
- Influence Others
- Pursue Personal Excellence
- Understand the Business



This job description is not all inclusive. CareSource
reserves the right to amend this job description at any
time. CareSource is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are
dedicated to fostering an environment of belonging that
welcomes and supports individuals of all backgrounds.#LI-GB1
responsibilities: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities for intelligent/robotic process automation and AI/ML to streamline business processes
Gather and define requirements for AI/ML and automation projects, translating business needs into technical specifications
Analyze and preprocess data for AI/ML model development and collaborate with data engineers on data pipelines and governance
Design, develop, and deploy RPA/IPA solutions using UiPath and/or Power Automate, creating and maintaining automation workflows
Develop and deploy machine learning models including algorithm selection, feature engineering, model training, and optimization
Monitor performance of deployed AI/ML models and automation solutions, iterating on improvements as necessary
Ensure seamless integration of AI/ML and automation solutions into existing systems and workflows
Lead projects from a development standpoint, perform technical code reviews, and provide guidance on emerging technologies
use_cases: Healthcare process automation using RPA and intelligent automation
Intelligent process automation for claims processing and administrative workflows
AI/ML-driven business process optimization to reduce manual efforts
Agentic AI and Generative AI solutions for healthcare operations
Data quality analysis and preprocessing for ML model development
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role directly involves designing, developing, training,
and deploying AI/ML models and algorithms, as well as
implementing Agentic AI/Generative AI solutions. The
developer is hands-on with model training, feature
engineering, optimization, and deployment, which constitutes
building and deploying AI systems directly.
